title: Linux Kernel Version Requirements — Linux kernel long term maintenance
text:
Active kernel releases can be found in
kernel.org
.
There are usually several
long term maintenance
kernel releases provided for the purposes of backporting
bug fixes for older kernel trees. Only important bug fixes are applied to such kernels and they don't
usually see very frequent releases, especially for older trees.
See the Linux kernel website for the
list of releases
in the
Longterm
category.
